description: Create a three-file Talon module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\powershell_integration\ that enables voice-controlled execution of PowerShell system administration commands, with output logged to C:\Users\Docker\talon_shell_output.txt. The module must include a Python file (powershell_commands.py) defining a 'powershell_integration' module and a 'user.ps_cmdlet' capture, implementing actions for ps_list_processes(), ps_disk_space(), ps_list_services(name: str), ps_network_test(), ps_event_log(), and ps_clear_output(). These actions must execute PowerShell diagnostic cmdlets via subprocess (using capture_output, text mode, and shell execution), append output with timestamp headers to the log file, include error handling, and trigger completion notifications. The module must also include a Talon file (powershell_commands.talon) mapping voice phrases ("shell list processes", "shell disk space", "shell find service <user.ps_cmdlet>", "shell network test", "shell event log", "shell clear output", and "shell open output") to these actions or a command to open the log file in Notepad. Finally, include a list file (powershell_services.talon-list) declaring 'list: user.ps_cmdlet' with at least 15 Windows service mappings.
